productDisplayName: Ant Kids Girl's Maroon With Flower Kidswear
description: CompositionMaroon sleeveless corduroy dress made of 100% cotton, with a ruffled hemline, and silver ribbon bow and rose on the chest  FittingComfort (18 months) Wash care Wash separately with mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Dry clean preferred Indulge your little girl in the spirit of spring in this dress from ant.The minimalist flower and bow on the chest and the ruffled hem imbibes in it a happy spirit. Team this with small rompers and booties when you take her out the next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while she enjoys those wondrous moments with you in style.
